examples: None of these efforts worked, and the people went home disappointedly.
"So neither one of you found the answer," Martin said disappointedly.
"And your husband lets you do this?" Mom mused somewhat disappointedly.
Rather disappointedly, there has been no mass absenteeism - or "chucking a sickie", which, I am reliably informed, is the correct terminology.
"I again didn't have any energy left" he admits disappointedly.
